greeting: Hello! Thank you for calling ClawForLife. How can I help you today?
hours: Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM Eastern

faq.question: What does ClawForLife do?
faq.answer: We build AI-powered automation tools that help businesses save time and close more deals. From AI receptionists to smart CRM systems.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Our plans start at 99 dollars with flexible monthly options. We'd love to schedule a quick call with our team to find the right fit for your business.

faq.question: Do you offer a demo?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We can schedule a personalized demo to show you exactly how our AI tools can help your specific business.
